GC-CLOUD WAVE 4 — FINANCE REVIEW COMMITTEE BRIEFING
Date: March 3, 2026
Prepared by: François Lemieux, Finance Representative
For: Finance Review Committee

PROJECT FINANCIAL STATUS — CONFIDENTIAL

This briefing provides the Finance Review Committee with an accurate
assessment of the GC-Cloud Wave 4 financial situation.

BUDGET OVERRUN: Following the infrastructure assessment completed
February 25, the project team has identified that the original budget
of $2,400,000 is insufficient. The assessment revealed mandatory
middleware remediation requirements that were not captured in the
initial scope. Estimated cost of remediation: $340,000.

REVISED PROJECTED COST: $2,740,000 — representing a budget overrun
of $340,000 (approximately 14% above approved envelope).

A formal budget revision request has been prepared and is awaiting
Director approval. Treasury Board notification will be required as
the variance exceeds the 10% threshold under the Directive on Project
Management.

TIMELINE AT RISK: The middleware remediation will require an estimated
three weeks of additional effort before cloud migration workloads can
begin. The Q3 2026 delivery target is now uncertain. The project
manager has been advised to reassess the schedule baseline.

RECOMMENDATION: Finance Committee should flag this project for
enhanced monitoring. Budget revision approval should be expedited
to prevent further schedule slippage.

STATUS: Budget overrun confirmed. Timeline at risk.
